mac_mini_bundle_upsell.notes: No Mac Mini hardware bundle or upsell logic exists in the codebase. No add-on, hardware, or bundle products defined in PRODUCTS or TIERS. To implement, a new product entry and upsell UI flow would need to be added to stripepay.py and the buy pages.

POST /api/pay (tier).notes: All 3 tiers create Stripe checkout sessions with correct amounts and subscription mode

POST /api/pay (product).notes: Product catalogue (us_market_intel_v1, agent_kit_v1, sentiment_api_v1) resolves correctly

POST /api/pay (ad-hoc).notes: Ad-hoc amount_cents + currency accepted with validation (min 50, max 99999900)

GET /api/pay.notes: Returns full product catalogue and tier listing

GET /api/pay?plan=<tier>.notes: 302 redirect to Stripe checkout with correct subscription params

GET /api/pay?product=<id>.notes: 302 redirect to Stripe checkout for one-time products

GET /api/pay/tiers.notes: Returns all 3 tiers with name, price, currency, price_label, features

GET /api/pay/status.notes: Reports configured=true, mode=dynamic, lists all products

GET /api/pay/success.notes: Verifies payment_status via Stripe API before delivering report

security_checks.input_validation: PASS — currency whitelist (usd/eur/gbp), amount bounds (50–99999900), tier/product ID validation
security_checks.missing_fields: PASS — returns 400 with clear error message
security_checks.no_key_fallback: PASS — returns 402 with instructions when key absent

issues_found: Mac Mini bundle upsell: NOT IMPLEMENTED — no hardware bundle product or upsell flow exists
summary: All 3 pricing tiers validated: Solo ($49/mo), Team ($149/mo), Enterprise ($499/mo) — correct amounts, subscription mode, Stripe sessions created. Mac Mini bundle upsell does NOT exist in the codebase and would need to be built.
